case_studies.headline: production sweep reaches stable green at 100-user readiness
case_studies.human_question: can i trust the system under real operational load?
case_studies.focus: run full sweep, enforce safety checks, and verify 10/100 readiness truth
case_studies.impact_statement: Readiness stayed green at scale (ready_for_10=True, ready_for_100=True) with max 32 passing checks.

case_studies.headline: external comms contradiction tests lock public claims to canonical truth
case_studies.human_question: how do i prevent docs from drifting away from real gate truth?
case_studies.focus: validate external comms alignment tests and enforce source-of-truth wiring
case_studies.impact_statement: Contradiction guard run reached status=complete with 5 passing tests to keep public claims anchored to canonical truth.

case_studies.headline: dashboard quality gates pass cleanly with explicit complete marker
case_studies.human_question: is this reliable enough to report upward without narrative risk?
case_studies.focus: verify lint + test + completion marker for externally-visible dashboard claims
case_studies.impact_statement: Reporting pipeline showed status=complete with 8 passing checks, reducing executive narrative risk.
